meaning: n.[蛹ｻ] 逖｢逞慕侭逖ｩ,逖｢逞慕丶
examples: Methods We divided keloid into inertia type and active type clinically.
Purpose To clarify the molecular pathological basis of infiltrating growth and onset of keloid.
Conclusion Operation combined with early postoperative radiotherapy is a effective method to treat keloid.
